name: Pesce Spada in Salmoriglio (Swordfish in Olive Oil Sauce)
recipeInstructions:
1. Begin by preparing the salmoriglio sauce. In a bowl, whisk together 3 tbsp olive oil, lemon juice, garlic, celery, oregano, parsley, salt, and pepper. Add 1 tbsp boiling water and beat thoroughly. Set aside at room temperature.
2. Prepare the fish steaks. Pour plenty of olive oil into a bowl and season lightly with salt and pepper. Immerse each swordfish steak in the sauce for 1 minute on each side. Grill for a few minutes on each side, being careful not to overcook the fish (timing depends upon the size of the steaks).
3. Place the cooked swordfish on a serving platter. Drizzle with salmoriglio sauce and serve immediately.
